reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Concept2 Logbook
reauth_confirm.description: The connection to your Concept2 Logbook account needs to be renewed.

abort.already_configured: This Concept2 Logbook account is already configured.
abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress.
abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Concept2 Logbook API.
abort.missing_configuration: The integration is not configured. Add your Concept2 application credentials first.
abort.oauth_failed: Error while obtaining an access token.
abort.oauth_timeout: Timed out resolving the OAuth2 token.
abort.wrong_account: Reauthentication was for a different Concept2 account than the one being reconfigured.

application_credentials.description: To authenticate, first register an application at the [Concept2 API Key portal]({api_key_portal_url}). During registration, set the redirect URI to `{redirect_url}`.
